name: Green Planet Bio Engineering Co. Ltd.
summary: Green Planet Bioengineering Co., Ltd. operates as a public reorganized shell corporation seeking to acquire or merge with an existing business operation. Originally incorporated as Mondo Acquisition II, Inc. in Delaware in 2006, the company previously operated in the agritech sector in China through Elevated Throne Overseas Ltd., which was divested in 2010. It currently has no active business operations.

partnerships.description: Ontario, Canada corporation that became majority stockholder of the Company in March 2012.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
